content:
Why choose JND eDiscovery?

Three team members named Relativity AI Visionaries...

Exclusive use of RelativityOne since its 2017 launch, with deep expertise across consulting, analytics, AI, and managed review

Recognized leader in AI-powered eDiscovery, having helped develop and test Relativity's generative AI tool aiR for Review

Premier workflows for prompt development, validation, sampling, and quality control applied to live matters

2024 Relativity Innovation Award winner in the Artificial Intelligence category

Three patented software applications: LayerCake™, MachOne™, and OneSearch™

Full-service offerings spanning legal hold, data collection, ESI processing, technology-assisted review, document review, and document production

Hall of Fame honors for "Best Managed eDiscovery and Litigation Support Provider" and "Best End-to-End eDiscovery Providers," marking the ninth top ranking in these categories
comment: At this level of GenAI-driven review, defensibility will hinge less on model capability and more on how prompt/version validation and sampling are documented for court scrutiny.
